specSection:
resolveOrCreate :: Topic → (Task, EntryPoint)
resolveOrCreate(T) =
  | isTaskId(T) → (lookupTask(T), fromStatus(lookupTask(T).status))
  | otherwise   → (createTask(T), ProposalLoop)
ground_truth_rationale: Topic is a free-form description, not matching ^task-\d+$. resolveOrCreate takes the otherwise branch: createTask('add OAuth2 login support') and returns ProposalLoop entry point. This is clearly NOT a task ID.
